species: The Crk4-Cyc4 complex regulates G2/M transition in Toxoplasma gondii
cell_type: Expression of the CDK-related kinase TgCrk4, of the cyclin TgCyc4, and of the inhibitor of the DNA and centrosome reduplication TgiRD1 is essential for binary division of T. gondii tachyzoites.
